subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Upon thee be My glory! The honored Ali, who circled the House, hath made repeated mention of thee at the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر علیک بهائی جناب علی الذی طاف البیت مکرر اذکار شما را بساحت اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for prosperity
